fato_historico: 1711: The treaty of Pruth between the Ottoman and Russian Empire is signed.
energia_do_dia: Today, you may feel an urge to resolve lingering conflicts with grace. Much like the historic wisdom that turned potential battlefields into signed agreements, it is a good time to negotiate peace in your personal life. Consider how your fiery drive can be channeled into building bridges rather than burning them. You possess great diplomatic potential today.
frase_do_dia: True strength is found in the courage to seek a peaceful resolution today.
significado_numero: Represents duality, partnership, and the harmonious balance of opposing forces.
conselho: Choose your words carefully and aim for collaboration instead of confrontation today.
